summary: Implemented CallTreeModel (Bubble Tea model) for the call tree panel with turn/tool node rendering, expand/collapse, anomaly highlighting, real-time flash, monitoring toggle, and keyboard navigation (j/k, Enter, n/p, d, s, m, Tab). Includes golden file tests for rendering verification.
keyDecisions: 3.2: Used map[int]bool for expanded state tracking since Turn struct lacks IsExpanded field
3.2: Flattened tree into visibleNode list for cursor navigation with turnIdx/entryIdx/depth fields
3.2: Sub-agent detection via ToolName==SubAgent && len(Children)>0 with 📦 icon and ×N count
3.2: Flash tracking via map[lineNum]expiryTime with 3-second flashDuration and cleanupExpiredFlashes
3.2: Emit typed messages (DiagnosisRequestMsg, DashboardToggleMsg, MonitoringToggleMsg) for parent App Model delegation
3.2: Used same PanelState enum and styling patterns as SessionsModel for consistency

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: internal/model/calltree.go implements CallTreeModel with Init(), Update(msg tea.Msg), View() string
States: Loading, Populated/Empty/Error, Node Expanded/Collapsed, Anomaly Highlight, New Node (realtime), Monitoring Off
Tree rendering: Turn nodes (●), tool calls with connectors (├─ └─), sub-agent summaries (📦)
Anomaly highlighting: yellow (slow >=30s), red (unauthorized), with emoji markers 🟡 🔴
Keyboard: j/k navigate, Enter expand/collapse, Tab focus transfer, n/p Turn jump, d diagnosis, s dashboard, m monitoring toggle
Real-time: new nodes appear with cyan flash + [NEW] prefix for 3 seconds
Monitoring toggle: m key toggles file watching on/off, updates status bar
Golden file tests for tree rendering with 3-turn session
State tests: expand/collapse, cursor navigation, anomaly highlighting

notes: All acceptance criteria met. 61 tests (7 golden + 54 unit) with 88.9% coverage.
